flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at North Central University are 25% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($45.1k vs $60.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Central University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.2k → $32.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Central University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($27.2k → $32.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at North Central University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (868 → 709).
